description_text: Product Description Universal Car Rear Bumper Diffuser Lip Spoiler Canard With LED Tail Brake Light Universal For Car Rear Bumper Diffuser Lip spoiler Canard With Tail Brake Light Specification: Type: Car Rear Bumper Diffuser Lip Spoiler With Tail Brake Light Material: Plastic Color: Glossy Carbon Fiber LED:Red Placement on Vehicle: Rear Quantity: 1 pc Size: As picture show Wiring method and mode: Yellow wire:Lower part Keep lighting Green wire:Lower part flash Red wire:Upper part Keep lighting W hite wire:Upper part flash Black Wire:12V- Fitment: Universal Car Features: -Easy installation Direct Adhesive etc. -With LED Tail Brake Stop Braking Light -A Great Upgrade For Your Vehicle. -Instruction Not Included, Professional Installation Is Highly Recommended. -Paste Installation，No need to drill hole on your car ！！！ Package Included: 1 x Car Rear Bumper Diffuser Lip Spoiler Note: -Please allow 1-3mm differs due to manual measurement. -Due to the different display and different light, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. Thanks for your unders Payment Returns Contact Us Shipping We accept payment by PayPal only !
